---
title: "404: Failed to reject the null hypothesis"
toc: false
---

We tested the hypothesis that this page exists.

- $H_0$: page exists
- $H_1$: page does not exist
- $p$-value: $1.000$

We fail to reject $H_0$ — but the evidence is, frankly, embarrassing.

Try one of these instead:

- [Home](/)
- [Blog](/blog/index.html)
- [Research](/research.html)
- [About](/about.html)
